trades.reasoning: Perfect score with all 5 bullish signals including volume surge, RSI at 66.1 — healthy momentum zone without being overbought, price well above SMA-20 on strong volume in a risk-on session.

decisions.briefing: Markets are solidly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1% and S&P 500 up 0.8%, a favorable backdrop for momentum names. With $670 in cash and 4 open slots, I'm deploying into NBIS — the top-scoring candidate with all five technical signals firing cleanly and RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish zone. LITE continues its run toward the 12% auto-sell target at +10.9%, so I'm letting the system handle that exit rather than selling early.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 1st in a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.0% and the S&P 500 gaining +0.8%. Technology and growth stocks outperformed as investors rotated back into higher-beta names amid improving sentiment. Volume surges across multiple momentum stocks — NBIS, CRWV, RDDT, PLTR — confirmed institutional participation rather than retail-only moves.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於5月1日全面上揚，呈現風險偏好格局，納斯達克指數領漲1.0%，標普500指數上升0.8%。科技股與成長股表現突出，投資者在市場情緒回暖下重新增持高貝塔資產。NBIS、CRWV、RDDT及PLTR等多隻動能股出現成交量激增，確認市場有機構資金參與，而非純粹散戶炒作。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on the idea that assets showing strong recent performance tend to keep rising in the short term. Traders use signals like RSI (momentum strength), MACD (trend direction), and volume surges (institutional confirmation) to identify stocks with the best setup. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply — which is why stop-losses are essential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，核心邏輯是近期強勢的資產短期內往往會延續漲勢。交易者透過RSI（動能強弱）、MACD（趨勢方向）及成交量激增（機構資金確認）等指標篩選最佳布局機會。風險在於動能可能急速逆轉，因此設置止損位至關重要。
